article_meta.title: President Donald Trump’s mass deportation operation is expected to ramp up in 2026 as newly hired military lawyers-turne

reasoning: Mostly neutral summary with balanced attribution to supporters and critics. Minor adoption of the article’s framing appears in the un-attributed phrase “accelerate mass deportations.” Otherwise, language is measured, claims are attributed, and perspectives are represented proportionally.

custom_reasoning.spin: Verbs are largely neutral; only “accelerate mass deportations” edges toward loaded phrasing.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Quantitative claims and assertions are sourced to the article or attributed to named sources.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: The term “mass deportations” is presented in the model’s voice without attribution; otherwise evaluative statements are attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured overall; one charged phrase (“mass deportations”) appears.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or mental states beyond quoted/attributed views.
custom_reasoning.slant: Includes both supportive and critical perspectives with similar prominence.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures main perspectives (administration/Arthur, TRAC/Kocher, Kuck); no major viewpoint is omitted.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Minimal; “mass” could be seen as loaded, but otherwise adjectives are neutral.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Generally neutral terminology; “mass deportations” carries political charge.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balance mirrors the source, noting both enforcement goals and civil liberties concerns.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats official and independent sources comparably.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Largely neutral paraphrase; slight inheritance of source framing via one phrase.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Lists distinct source types and perspectives proportionally, including data sources and critics.
